name: Avatar
summary: Circular user image from `src`, falling back to initials; Gravatar lookup is opt-in via `gravatar` (off by default — no email hash leaves the browser without it). Use it for profile pictures and identity chips.

props.name: email
props.description: Email used for Gravatar lookup when src missing.

props.name: name
props.description: Display name used to derive initials for offline fallback.

props.name: gravatar
props.description:
Opt in to a third-party Gravatar lookup from `email` when no `src`
is given. Default `false`: src-less avatars render an offline
initials/placeholder fallback and make **no network request**.

Privacy: enabling this discloses a reversible md5 of the email plus
the viewer's IP/UA to Automattic. Requires a non-empty `email`.

props.name: gravatarDefault
props.description: Gravatar default-image style (`d` param) when `gravatar` is enabled.

props.name: preferFallback
props.description:
Force the offline fallback even when `gravatar` + `email` would
otherwise resolve a network avatar. Legacy escape hatch; with
`gravatar` defaulting to `false` the fallback is already the default.

props.name: fallback
props.description: Offline fallback strategy when showing a non-network avatar.

props.name: preset
props.description: One or many style-preset names registered via `definePreset()`

bestPractices: Use initials fallback for missing images; ensure background/foreground meet contrast.
Keep size tokens consistent across lists, menus, and headers.
Provide alt text or aria-label describing the person or entity.
Avoid using Avatar for content images; use `Image` instead.
Group with labels or presence indicators when they add value; avoid redundant decoration.

Gravatar is opt-in (`gravatar`, default false): a src-less Avatar renders an offline initials/placeholder fallback and makes no network request. Enable `gravatar` only with the user's awareness — loading the URL discloses a reversible md5 of their email plus their IP/UA to a third party (Automattic).

examples.title: Sizes
examples.code:
<Stack direction='row' gap={1}>
  {(['xl','lg','md','sm','xs'] as const).map(s => (
    <Avatar key={s} email='support@gravatar.com' gravatar size={s} />
  ))}
</Stack>

examples.title: Gravatar default style
examples.code: <Stack direction='row' gap={1}><Avatar email='no-such@example.com' gravatar gravatarDefault='retro' /><Avatar email='no-such@example.com' gravatar gravatarDefault='monsterid' /></Stack>
